runs.title: Build a standard-library HTML card collector.

required_command_evidence.command: python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__reset', timeout=5).read()" && python aurora_index.py http://127.0.0.1:8765/aurora/cards aurora_records.json

python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('aurora_records.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) == 9, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('sigil', 'label', 'group', 'rank', 'detail_url')) for record in records)

with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__metrics', timeout=5) as response:
    metrics = json.load(response)
assert metrics['count'] == 1, metrics
assert metrics['requests'] == ['/aurora/cards'], metrics
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY

independent_failures: payload mismatch: expected [{'sigil': 'VR-12', 'label': 'Pewter Bloom', 'group': 'delta', 'rank': 8, 'detail_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/details/vr-12'}, {'sigil': 'VR-29', 'label': 'Cobalt Wren', 'group': 'gamma', 'rank': 19, 'detail_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/details/vr-29'}, {'sigil': 'VR-44', 'label': 'Amber Flute', 'group': 'delta', 'rank': 2, 'detail_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/details/vr-44'}], got []
request sequence mismatch: expected ['/aurora/cards?variant=2'], got None
request count mismatch: expected 1, got None

runs.title: Build a namespace-tolerant RSS collector.

required_command_evidence.command: python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__reset', timeout=5).read()" && python prism_feed.py http://127.0.0.1:8765/prism/feed prism_entries.json

python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('prism_entries.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) == 7, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('headline', 'link', 'published', 'source', 'summary')) for record in records)

with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__metrics', timeout=5) as response:
    metrics = json.load(response)
assert metrics['count'] == 1, metrics
assert metrics['requests'] == ['/prism/feed'], metrics
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY

independent_failures: payload mismatch: expected [{'headline': 'Orchid Current', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/orchid', 'published': '2026-06-04T03:00:00Z', 'source': 'Delta Wire', 'summary': 'Channels converge.'}, {'headline': 'Pewter Dawn', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/pewter', 'published': '2026-06-04T05:00:00Z', 'source': 'Delta Wire', 'summary': None}], got [{'headline': 'Orchid Current', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/orchid', 'published': '2026-06-04T03:00:00+00:00', 'source': 'Prism Dispatch', 'summary': 'Channels converge.'}, {'headline': 'Pewter Dawn', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/pewter', 'published': '2026-06-04T05:00:00+00:00', 'source': 'Prism Dispatch', 'summary': ''}]

runs.title: Complete a cursor-based JSON API collector.

required_command_evidence.command: python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__reset', timeout=5).read()" && python orbit_cursor.py http://127.0.0.1:8765/orbit/measurements?cursor= orbit_measurements.json

python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('orbit_measurements.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) == 10, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('identity', 'title', 'measure', 'origin')) for record in records)

with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__metrics', timeout=5) as response:
    metrics = json.load(response)
assert metrics['count'] == 2, metrics
assert metrics['requests'] == ['/orbit/measurements?cursor=', '/orbit/measurements?cursor=phase-amber-2'], metrics
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY

independent_failures: payload mismatch: expected [{'identity': 'NV1', 'title': 'Aster Dial', 'measure': 6, 'origin': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/sensors/nv1'}, {'identity': 'NV2', 'title': 'Birch Gauge', 'measure': 71, 'origin': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/sensors/nv2'}, {'identity': 'NV3', 'title': 'Coral Vane', 'measure': 9, 'origin': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/sensors/nv3'}], got [{'identity': 'NV1', 'title': 'Aster Dial', 'measure': 6, 'origin': '/sensors/nv1'}, {'identity': 'NV2', 'title': 'Birch Gauge', 'measure': 71, 'origin': '/sensors/nv2'}, {'identity': 'AX1', 'title': 'Moss Dial', 'measure': 14, 'origin': '/sensors/ax1'}, {'identity': 'AX2', 'title': 'Reed Gauge', 'measure': 27, 'origin': '/sensors/ax2'}, {'identity': 'AX3', 'title': 'Stone Vane', 'measure': 5, 'origin': '/sensors/ax3'}, {'identity': 'AX4', 'title': 'Cloud Pin', 'measure': 103, 'origin': '/sensors/ax4'}, {'identity': 'AX5', 'title': 'Tern Ring', 'measure': 42, 'origin': '/sensors/ax5'}, {'identity': 'AX6', 'title': 'Fern Relay', 'measure': 8, 'origin': '/sensors/ax6'}]

runs.title: Build a collector for the documented CNEOS news feed.

required_command_evidence.command:
python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('cedar_brief.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) >= 5, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('headline', 'link', 'published', 'source', 'summary')) for record in records)
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY
